creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=headamd64PR222745-default&build=2018-04-07_20h43m07s

More than 8400 ports were newly skipped,  mainly due to ftp/curl failure
